chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-66 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.254/2024 3. For hearing of main case 20-02-2024 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Advocate General Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wasan, Assistant Advocate General a/w I.O / SIP Ali Akbar Chohan PS Kandiaro and ASI Hakim Ali of PS Kandiaro.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- I.O has appeared and submits that subject case bearing Crime No.11/2024, registered at Police Station Kandiaro, u/s 365-B, 452, 34 PPC, on statement of petitioner Mst. Fiza that she has contracted marriage out of her free will and has not been abducted by any one, has been disposed of under ‘C’ class. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and accordingly the petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
